summary: Frontend testing of refactored checkout page. All checkout components working correctly: DeliveryModeSelector toggles between shipping/pickup modes, PickupStoreSelector shows stores and time slots, DiscountCodeSection conditionally hidden in pickup mode, BillingAddressForm with pincode lookup, OrderSummaryPanel with correct pricing. RecentlyViewedSection triggers on cart add.

details: Checkout page loads at /checkout
Shows guest login prompt for unauthenticated users
Empty cart state shows 'Your cart is empty' with Browse Fragrances button
Cart items display correctly in checkout
data-testid='delivery-mode-shipping' correctly selects Ship to Address mode
data-testid='delivery-mode-pickup' correctly selects Self-Pickup mode
Default mode is 'shipping'
Mode selection updates UI appropriately
All form fields visible: Title, Name, Email, Phone, Pincode, Address, City, State
Pincode lookup auto-fills City and State (tested with 110001 -> Central Delhi, Delhi)
data-testid attributes present: checkout-name-input, checkout-email-input, checkout-phone-input, checkout-pincode-input, checkout-address-input
Form title changes to 'Your Details' in pickup mode
Shows 2 pickup stores (M.G. Shoppie in Delhi, Mela Stores in Bhagalpur)
Payment options: 'Pay ₹11 Token Now' and 'Pay Full Amount Now'
Time slots: 11:00 AM - 2:00 PM, 2:00 PM - 5:00 PM, 5:00 PM - 8:00 PM
Validation message shown when time slot not selected
Visible only in shipping mode
Hidden in self-pickup mode (as designed)
Shows available discount codes: TESTDISCOUNT10, HOLISPECIAL2026, TESTDIWALIUI2026
Apply button with data-testid='apply-discount-btn'
data-testid='order-summary-panel' present
Shows cart items with images, names, quantities, prices
Shipping mode: Subtotal + Shipping = Total (₹110 + ₹149 = ₹259)
Pickup mode: FREE shipping, Token/Store payment breakdown
Free shipping progress bar visible
data-testid='place-order-btn' present and functional
Shows 'Same as billing address' checkbox
Only visible in shipping mode
RecentlyViewedSection component imported in LandingPage.jsx
localStorage key 'addrika_recently_viewed' populated on cart add
Products added to recently viewed include: id, name, subtitle, image, viewedAt
Section displays after page refresh when localStorage has data

critical_code_review_comments: ✓ CheckoutPage.jsx properly uses modular hooks (useCheckoutForm, useDeliveryMode, useDiscountCode, useOrderPricing, useRazorpayPayment)
✓ All checkout sub-components have proper data-testid attributes for testing
✓ utils.js contains shared constants (TOKEN_AMOUNT=11, PICKUP_TIME_SLOTS, SHIPPING_TIERS)
✓ Conditional rendering works correctly (discount section hidden in pickup mode)
✓ RecentlyViewedSection integrates with FragranceGrid via addToRecentlyViewed on cart add

test_credentials.note: Provided admin credentials (contact.us@centraders.com / 110078) do not work for user login - shows 'Invalid credentials'. Guest checkout works correctly.

context_for_next_testing_agent: Checkout refactoring complete. All modular components in /app/frontend/src/pages/checkout/ working correctly. Recently Viewed feature stores products in localStorage when added to cart. Guest checkout fully functional. User login credentials provided in review_request appear to be admin-only credentials.

mocked_apis.note: No checkout APIs mocked per review_request
